summary: Validated ADM Master blindagem end-to-end via Playwright on http://localhost:3000. Login as master works. In Cadastros tab, master row shows green MASTER shield badge, BLINDADO lock badge (testid master-locked-{id}) in Actions column instead of edit/delete buttons, and row has bg-emerald-50/30. Non-master users still show edit-user-{id} / delete-user-{id} buttons. window.editSystemUser(masterId) alerts 'blindada' and does NOT load the form. window.deleteSystemUser(masterId) alerts 'blindada' (verified after bypassing self-check) and master remains in Firestore. window.adminCreateUser with email=oficialsnts@gmail.com alerts 'reservado' and does NOT persist. Regression: created and deleted a normal test admin user successfully; the 3 cards / Cadastros structure intact. Master account was NOT deleted.
critical_code_review_comments: deleteSystemUser: isSelf check ('Você não pode excluir a sua própria conta ativa') runs BEFORE the isMasterUser check. When the master is logged in and tries to delete himself the message shown is 'própria conta ativa' rather than 'blindada'. Blindagem still holds (nothing is deleted), but for a more consistent UX consider moving the isMasterUser check first so master account always shows the shield message.
index.html has grown to 2320 lines — consider splitting into modules (auth, admin-users, suppliers, store views) for maintainability.
seed_data_creation: Created and immediately deleted a TEST admin user (test_regression_*@example.com) as part of regression. No residual test data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Blindagem do ADM Master funcionando 100%. Único ponto de melhoria opcional: ordem dos checks em deleteSystemUser (isSelf antes de isMaster). NÃO EXCLUIR oficialsnts@gmail.com em nenhum teste futuro.
